title: A Sticky Adventure to the Castle of Slime
summary: Seeker and Wizard Bobizard discover a mysterious blue and orange potion created by Isabella. After drinking it and reciting a magical rhyme, they are transported to Slime World, a bouncy yet incredibly sticky land. Guided by an alien named Sneeter, they explore a ball-shaped slime castle filled with fuzzy Snooper-ka-floopers. They learn that the Queen of Slime World has been helping a lost kitten named Jinjar—the notorious Balloon Popper—return home. Following their encounter, the group drinks a returning potion to safely arrive back at Seeker's castle.

highlightQuote.text: Slime bo-bime, slime bo-bime, slime bo-bime!

transcript.text: Now we can see the stars, now we can see the stories.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Can we do a story about Seeker and Wizard Bobizard?
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Yes. Once upon a time, Seeker was at home in his castle until ding dong, ding dong. And he said, 'Oh, I think that was the doorbell. I wonder who could be here?'
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Wizard Bobizard.
And he said, 'Oh, well, hello Wizard Bobizard. Uh, what can I do for you today?'
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: An old new potion.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: An old new potion? An old not-new potion that you haven't drunk before. Ah, I see. You're very curious about my potion closet, aren't you? Well, I am too and it's nice to have an excuse to experiment with a friend. Well, come on downstairs and we'll go open up the potion closet and poke around and see what we can find. Hmm.
Well, I know what that one is. Oh, that's a Floofer Cloud potion. That's the Planet of the Mookers. There's a Volcano World potion.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Volcano.
Oh, but that's not one we don't know about. We've taken that one before. And let's see, oh there's a Grassy World one and...
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Which one do we not know about?
The Rainbow Forest one... well these are all ones we've tried lately. And oh the ocean one, I just did with Peacock the Wizard earlier. That was a nice one. Let's see. Hmm.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Dad
transcript.text: Now this one is... it kind of looks kind of slimy and it doesn't look familiar. And it's orange and a little bit blue mixed in there. And it looks like...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh that! I've done... I've done that. I did that this night.
And Seeker said, 'What did you do? What do you mean?'
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: I just... I made it slimy mixed with water and then that made it really slimy and then I mixed blue in there and put it in an ice cube and then I tried to make it into a potion for you.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, so that's where this came from. Well so then, when you were at the grocery store this morning, I prepared up that potion.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: And then when you came back, you looked in your potion closet, I think, and you saw a blue... something blue in your potion closet.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Wizard Bobizard said, 'My goodness! But what is this potion going to do, Isabella? Maybe we should...'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's gonna take us to Blue and Green Slime World. Yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Slime World! I've never been there,' said Wizard Bobizard. And Seeker said, 'Me neither.' 'Well then let's take a sip.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay. Are you coming with us, Isabella? I think so.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. And so Seeker took a sip and Wizard Bobizard took a sip and they handed the potion to Isabella. Would you like to do the rhyme, Izzy?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Slime bo-bime, slime bo-bime, slime bo-bime!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Slime bo-bime! And then there was a slurping sound. 'What creatures are in Slime World? Where are you?' And Seeker said, 'Now wait a minute, slow down. We've got to examine our surroundings because none of us have ever been to Slime World before. What do you notice first?'
It's so bouncy!
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, but wait a minute. And Seeker bounced his foot up and down and then lifted his foot up and it went 'shloop' because the slime was sticking to his boot and then 'snap' it snapped back down. Hmm. It's going to be hard to walk around here. And he tried lifting his feet to walk and went 'shloop, shloop'. This slime is so sticky and gooey. And Wizard Bobizard said, 'Hmm, I wonder how we're going to get around.' And Seeker said, 'Yes, well, let's examine a little further. What color was the slimy ground?'
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Seeker said, 'Well, right here around my feet, it's kind of mostly orange.' And Wizard Bobizard says, 'Over here next to my feet, it's kind of blue.' And then in front of their feet there was a blue and orange area and then something small crawled up to Seeker's leg. 'Oh my goodness, what is this?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I am a creature!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hello, creature! Nice to meet you. I am Seeker.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I am Sneeter.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Sneeter? Nice to meet you, Sneeter. Do you live here in this Slime World?
Yep! And... who's that?
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: That's my friend Wizard Bobizard and that's my other friend Isabella. And Sneeter, what kind of a creature are you?
An alien.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: An alien! And what did Sneeter look like?
A blue and green creature.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: No, he only had legs.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Only legs, no arms. Did Sneeter have a tail?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Yep.
A legs and a tail. And wings?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: No.
No wings. And eyes?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Yes.
And a mouth?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And a nose and ears?
Yes, a nose and ears. And also a body. And on his belly he was brown and on his back he was green.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Wow, Sneeter. You're a very interesting creature,' said Seeker. 'I've never seen someone like you. Are there more creatures like you?'
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Of course! But except they're all sleeping. You can hear them snoring. Actually, you can hear them saying zzz.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: I see. Would you... um, show us around Slime World a little bit, Sneeter?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then he hopped on one foot. Boing boing boing boing... Follow me on one foot!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay,' said Seeker. 'Let's boing! Everybody boing!'
Now we're in the castle.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, there's a castle in Slime World? What's the castle made of?
Slime.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: It's a slime castle. And what... what does the castle look like from the outside?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Just a big ball.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, it's a big ball. Does it have a door or window or towers?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Yes, it does.
Oh, but it's a ball-shaped castle. And what color is it?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Orange and blue.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so Seeker and Wizard Bobizard and Isabella followed Sneeter into the Slime World castle. Boing boing boing boing... and then...
Lots of other creatures like him came boing-ing.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh! And what is this kind of creature called?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: A Snooper-ka-flooper. Boing boing! And then they went boing-ing up the stairs and in the bathroom and everywhere there was a Snooper-ka-flooper.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Wow, there's Snooper-ka-floopers all over the place in this Slime World castle,' said Seeker.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: And they were just fuzzy balls. They were fuzzy balls like this.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, fuzzy balls? I thought they were little slime creatures like Sneeter.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, Sneeter was a different creature and they were different creatures. And we are related to the Floofers and we're the Floofers' next cousins. We visit them all the time.
My goodness,' said Seeker. 'Fascinating. I had no idea that the Floofers had other cousins. And you've been to the Floofer Cloud?'
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Yes! On a magic flying ladder.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: You do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You have your own magic flying ladder and you use it to get from...?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But it's just so slimy. It's just slimy so we can stick to it and never ever fall off.

Amazing. My ladder... I also have a magic flying ladder, but it's not sticky, but I can hold on with my hands. Wow, I had no idea so many wonderful things would be here in the Slime World for us to encounter. Um, is there a leader or a king or a ruler of the Slime World? Or do you all just live here in the castle together?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: We got a queen, but she right now is talking to the bad guy Balloon Popper.
The bad guy Balloon Popper? Who's that?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: The kitten, remember? The kitten.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, the kitten that was popping all the balloons in Balloon World.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yep. She just got lost in the Slime World and now the Queen talked her through about how to get back to where she lived. And then she said, 'My name is Jinjar.' And she hopped back to Izzy's house. She just boing boing boing... and then she was back at Izzy's.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, thank goodness she got back to where she belongs,' said Seeker. 'Well, this has been a wonderful visit to Slime World and we met so many creatures and learned so many interesting facts about Slime World. I think it's time for us to head home, don't you, Wizard Bobizard?' And Wizard Bobizard said, 'Yep.' And Izzy said, 'Yep.' So we're going to take our going-home potion. And they all sipped, sip sip sip. And then pop they were back at Seeker's castle. And that is the end of stars and stories.
Let's do shadow puppets! Let's do shadow puppets!
transcript.speaker: Izzy

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Wizard Bobizard
characters.description: Seeker's friend, a wizard who often experiments with potions.

characters.name: Isabella
characters.description: A towering Dimatar scholar and alchemist of Atsukeeseet, Mama Izzy is a clever kiddo at heart and a steadfast guardian of rooftop gardens and intricate dollhouses. Gifted with the power of flight, she navigates the open heights with aquatic grace, her massive frame often shielded by a special protective metal that glimmers even as she descends into the shadows. As a resourceful quartermaster, she employs red flashlights, gold-laced slimes, and pipe cleaners to mend a Lanternshark’s failing light, yet her generosity remains her hallmark; she freely shares her vast library, brokers homes for dragons, and teaches others to find the resonance in their own voices. Her most profound magic resides in her vast, soft blanket—a sanctuary of ultimate coziness—where she remains a brave, quick-witted protector to all who honor her singular request for absolute silence.

characters.name: Peacock the Wizard
characters.description: Once a deep-ocean companion to Seeker, this vibrant bird wizard now serves as the charismatic host of the magical castle’s grand show. From a cozy nest atop a soaring tower, they orchestrate wonder through balloon school arts—transmuting rubber into succulent strawberries—while proudly sporting a magnificent hat gifted by Hattie and Izzy. A playful visionary of dreamer magic and a tireless seeker of rare diamond-shaped potions, they use their stage to beckon heroes into a world of soaring imagination, often dispatching them on whimsical quests to recover enchanted new hats for their growing collection.

characters.name: Sneeter
characters.description: A blue and green alien resident of Slime World with only legs and a tail.

characters.name: Snooper-ka-floopers
characters.description: Fuzzy ball creatures in Slime World who are related to the Floofers.

characters.name: The Floofers
characters.description: Tiny, pom-pom-like, and irrepressibly bouncy, these magical ball-shaped denizens of the Floofer Clouds leap with wide-eyed grace across resilient, vaporous peaks. Sustained by a vital dependency on floof-berries, these restless creatures possess a staggering verticality and a vibrant energy so potent that falling asleep remains an elusive feat.

characters.name: The Queen of Slime World
characters.description: The ruler of the slime dimension who resides in the ball-shaped castle.

characters.name: Jinjar
characters.description: Also known as the Balloon Popper, she is a kitten who got lost in Slime World.

places.name: Seeker's Castle
places.description: Behind an unassuming facade and a solitary doorbell lies Seeker’s home, a sprawling magical fortress that serves as a vital sanctuary for weary legends. The interior expands into a labyrinthine refuge where an expansive library of mystical books towers beside a potion closet that acts as the true gateway to adventure. This fortress is a hub for calls to action and well-earned rest, where Wobbly Whiskers waits to greet the Seeker and Buddy the Mouse—though the warmth of their homecoming is inevitably punctuated by his latest sticky mess upon the rug.

places.name: Potion Closet
places.description: Hidden behind a secret door in Seeker’s castle lies a vaulted chamber lined with enchanted cabinets, rare ingredients, and complex concoctions. Shimmering vials containing the molten heat of Volcano World and the verdant gales of Grassy World glow upon the shelves, while the air remains thick with curious sniffs—fleeting, sensory echoes of the bottled magic stored within this hidden sanctum.

places.name: Floofer Cloud
places.description: A distant and storied realm, this ancestral cradle serves as the Floofers' original sanctuary—a soft, fluffy, and sparkly world of profound comfort. Draped in the downy materials from which their gentle lineage first emerged, it remains a shimmering environment where they live and play.

places.name: Planet of the Mookers
places.description: An enigmatic alien world defined by its fuzzy yet curiously slimy surface, this planet serves as the ancestral cradle of the Mookers and the site of Chicky’s destined path. Strewn with the colossal remains of giant fossils, the realm was recently scouted by Seeker and Buddy and documented in the Seeker’s potion closet; it remains accessible only to those who imbibe a specific purple alchemical elixir.

places.name: Volcano World
places.description: A dangerous world that Seeker has visited before.

places.name: Rainbow Forest
places.description: Once charted by the Seeker and reachable only via the alchemical potency of Uncle Grisco’s potions, this kaleidoscopic forest is partitioned into radiant domains of red, orange, and gold. Beneath shifting, vibrant canopies, travelers navigate these distinct chromatic sections in search of the magical creatures lost within its shimmering depths.

places.name: Slime World
places.description: A vibrant, magical realm where the landscape is sculpted from iridescent orange and blue slime. This viscous dimension is inherently bouncy and sticky, ensuring that every fall is met with a soft, rhythmic rebound and turning the undulating ground into a playground of safe, gravity-defying leaps.

places.name: Slime World Castle
places.description: A large, ball-shaped castle made of orange and blue slime.

places.name: Balloon World
places.description: A magical realm of taut latex and rhythmic squeaks, this buoyant landscape is the whimsical birthplace of the kitten Jinjar. From its cushioning ground and rolling hills to its intricate architecture and inflated delicacies, every wonder is crafted entirely from balloons. Held in a state of delicate, colorful tension, the land is home to gossamer-light denizens who drift through a world of pure, air-filled whimsy.

places.name: Izzy's House
places.description: Once the silent harbor of Jinjar’s return and the site of Rizzo and Izzy’s fateful council, this fortified sanctuary now serves as the primary destination reachable via a magical potion. Anchoring the company against the encroaching storm, the hallowed dwelling resembles a quaint hotel of labyrinthine rooms, featuring a celestial starry rug that blankets the ground where heroes once prepared for their departure to the dragon’s castle.
